caption: A man with spiked grey hair, glasses, and headphones sits in a room, speaking into a black microphone. He is wearing a white dress shirt, a red and white bowtie, and gold suspenders. In the background, a woman with pink hair wearing a green top is visible. Behind her, a sign reads "UNIQUE FASHION." A framed picture of a yellow shield logo hangs on the wall to the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his facial expressions and mouth movements as he speaks. Overlaid on the scene are graphics including a logo that says "TALK 101 PODCAST" on the left and the red text "TALK 101" on the right. The background and equipment remain static as the man continues his conversation.
